Other factors should possibly cause the change in the dependent variable Y
Both X and Y should co-vary

qt: Control for a third variable makes a:
Which of the following control techniques that is available to researcher, controls for both known and unknown variables?
op: Building the extraneous variable into the design

qt: In an experimental research study, the primary goal is to isolate and identify the effect produced by which of the following?
Which of the following is the process of marking segments of data with symbols, descriptive words or category?
A study that involves no researcher intervention is called __________.
In frequency tables total of columns and rows are called:
In quasi-experimental research designs, causal interpretations can be made _______.
op: Only when rival explanations have been shown to be implausible
Only when rival explanations have been shown to be plausible
Only when there is a single participant in the experiment
Only when the participants have been randomly selected

qt: Frequency distribution technique can be used for which of the following scales?
The incidence of refusal in mall intercept interviews is _______________.
